chunks.text: Presidents of Women in Computer Science and Engineering (WICSE) - EECS at Berkeley Presidents of Women in Computer Science and Engineering (WICSE) 1977-78 – Paula Hawthorn 1978-79 – Barbara Simons 1979-80 – Faith Fich 1980-81 – Joan Boyer 1981-82 – Jane Doughty 1982-83 – Deborah Estrin 1983-84 – Kathie Nichols 1984-85 – Myra Boenke 1985-86 – Cecilia Aragon 1986-87 – Barbara Mills 1987-88 – Christine Black 1988-89 – Marie desJardins and Amy Wendt 1989-90 – Doris Karlson 1990-91- Jennifer McManis 1991-92 – Dawn Tilbury 1992-93 – Linda Kamas, Nobuko Nathan and Ruth Rosenholtz 1993-94 – Carol Paxson and Gitanjali Swamy 1994-95 -Lisa Buckman and Ginger Ogle 1995-96 – Kim Keeton 1996-97 – Marlene Wan 1997-98 – Janice Hudgings and Chen-Nee Chuah 1998-99 – Megan Thomas 1999-2000 – Randi Thomas 2000-01 – Jinwen Xiao and Lixia Zhou 2001-02 – Judith Liebman 2002-03 – Hayley Iben and Shannon Zelinski 2003-04 – Hayley Iben and Marci Meingast 2004-05 – Marci Meingast and Cecilia Aragon 2005-06 – Marci Meingast 2006-07 – Bonnie Kirkpatrick and Juliet Holwill 2007-08 – Bonnie Kirkpatrick and Lynn Wang 2008-09 – Bonnie Zhu and Kris Woyach 2009-10 – Erin Summers and Katya Gonina 2010-11 – Colleen Lewis and Aude Hofleitner 2011-12 – Mobin Javed and Qie Hu 2012-13 – Kristin Stephens and Judy Hoffman 2013-14 – Claire Lochner and Sakshi Jain 2014-15- Virginia Smith and Katie Driggs-Campbell 2015-16 – Lisa Anne Hendricks and Chelsea Finn 2016-17 – Vidya Muthukumar and Orianna DeMasi 2017-18 – Coline Devin and Alice Ye 2018-19
